title: Is Evangelion your FAVORITE anime
wikitext:
[]: Is Evangelion your FAVORITE anime?             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Sat Jan 27, 2007 3:31 pm as i am kind of suffering from evangelion burnout right now (and getting into some more stuff i haven't watched), i'd like to ask a question: is evangelion your personal favorite series? i still love it, natch, but on the whole, i think r.o.d the tv and last exile are my current favorites. ghost in the shell: stand alone complex and gilgamesh are two other shows that i enjoy.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jan 27, 2007 4:01 pm "Favourite" is a difficult thing. NGE certainly has a very special place in my affections - if that is the right word for something that emotionally scarred me - as a landmark in things I have read or watched. It will, I am reasonably sure, stand out as an individual, rather than being lost in the mass. I'm more likely to be excited about titles I'm currently watching or have recently watched (those that are more than just eye-candy, at least).

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Jan 27, 2007 4:03 pm If one truly believes that there isn't anything better than Evangelion, why bother watching anime at all? I've never been the type to choose a single one out of many as a "favorite" or "best", there are plenty of great shows, some better or worse in some ways than others. The only times I watch Evangelion these days (not counting rewatching a set of scenes), is when I show it to other people and I'm there more or less as a neutral commentator.

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Sat Jan 27, 2007 4:06 pm It's one of the three that I'd consider myself a big fan of (the other two being the original Mobile Suit Gundam and Cat Ninden Teyandee).

[]: Re: is evangelion your FAVORITE anime?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jan 27, 2007 5:07 pm Toilet Duck wrote: is evangelion your personal favorite series?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 27, 2007 5:56 pm Mr. Tines wrote: "Favourite" is a difficult thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jan 27, 2007 9:07 pm Currently, yes, considering it's the latest anime I've gotten into--my current love--so to speak. :P There are other anime and/or manga I like (Excel Saga, Ebichu, Marmalade Boy, Gravivation), though in terms of # 1 favorite next to Eva, would have to be Sailormoon. It was the show that pretty much got me into anime (though I did see some episodes of Robotech and Voltron beforehand, during Toonami 1998), and hey, you can't go wrong with Mitsuishi Kotono-sama. Though I admit 5 seasons, 200 episodes and 3 movies (plus several speicals) of the "monster-of-the-day" formula DOES wear out thin; it's a shame it couldn't have been closer to Takeuchi-sensei's manga in that respect, espeically the Sailor Stars (5th season, unreleased in America) arc of the anime and manga.

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Sun Jan 28, 2007 12:03 am I went throught an eva stage.Its the single reason i joind this forum but it soon faded and realized hellsing is my fav...but today that changed!I bought the first volume of HELLSING ULTIMATE! It is now officialy my fav anime.After i watched that beautiful 50 minutes of badassery i noticed reis face on my platinum edition and couldnt remember her name for a few seconds. Screw eva its all about hellsing ultimate for me.But i need the socialism so i continue to come here...this is my creed.

[]:             Quote Post by ThroneofDravaris » Sun Jan 28, 2007 1:12 am Kare Kano just outs Evangelion as my favorite anime.

[]:             Quote Post by terminus » Sun Jan 28, 2007 2:31 am Cowboy Bebop, Ah My Goddess, ties Evangelion for favorite anime for me.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sun Jan 28, 2007 8:03 am Eva is stil my favorite but I rarely watch it anymore. (Its probably been a year since I last saw it) It is more my favorite for sentimental reasons than anything. It was the first anime I really got hooked on. Now I watch a whole range of other anime from many different genres. I get bored with only one type of anime all the time.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Jan 28, 2007 10:22 am For me, NGE is a favorite and not the favorite. It currently competes with Excel Saga, Black Lagoon, FLCL, Cowboy Bebop and Ghost in the Shell: SAC.

[]:             Quote Post by Ejinathan » Sun Jan 28, 2007 11:11 am in my case it kinda is my favourite anime, but with a close folowing of Eureka 7 . Evangelion is the first anime where my tears dropped down hum... unforgetable such memories.

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Sun Jan 28, 2007 12:20 pm That's uhhh, why I'm here.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sun Jan 28, 2007 6:30 pm Eva is my fav anime, Big O is my second fave, and Trigun, Fate/Stay Night, and FMA are kinda entertaining too. But I find I don't like much in the way of anime. Strange.

[]:             Quote Post by Jay911 » Sun Jan 28, 2007 6:43 pm Evangelion is tops for me. Haruhi, Love Hina, and Mai HiME come in a close second (all tied), and the rest just line up after that.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Jan 28, 2007 6:58 pm Without question. The only anime that have come remotely close to being regarded as highly as Eva in my eyes are Eureka Seven, Gankutsuou, The Melancholy of Haruhi Suzumiya, Cowboy Bebop, FLCL, and Kare Kano.

[]:             Quote Post by Houndour » Sun Jan 28, 2007 10:50 pm I'm going to openly display my anime n00bdom and say this is the first anime I've actually explored, and enjoyed. I haven't seen everything (just not EoE) -- with any luck, I might get it for my birthday.

[]:             Quote Post by Firebee » Mon Jan 29, 2007 9:42 am Evangelion is teh favourite here. Haruhi, Fate/Stay Night, Tsukihime: Lunar Legend, Bleach come in second.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo2.0 » Wed Jan 31, 2007 7:46 am lets see its a close call Eva, hellsing, Bugglegum crisis 2040, bubblegum crisis. love hina, tenchi, AMG, FMA i like lots of anime i dont have a fave
summary: []: Is Evangelion your FAVORITE anime?             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Sat Jan 27, 2007 3:31 pm as i am kind of suffering from evangelion burnout right now (and getting into some more stuff i haven't watched), i'd like to ask a question: is evangelion your personal favorite series? i still love it, natch, but on the whole, i think r.o.d the tv and last exile are my current favorites. ghost in the shell: stand alone c
